expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: shipment checkpoint distinguishes hyperlink styling, contextual navigation behavior, and fallback rendering safety
expectations.evidence: The output explicitly enumerates the case-focus items under “Case-focus coverage expected to appear explicitly in Phase 5b artifacts (advisory checkpoints)”, listing “Hyperlink styling distinguishability”, “Contextual navigation behavior”, and “Fallback rendering safety” with sub-bullets.

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: result.md repeatedly anchors to Phase 5b (e.g., “Primary phase under test: Phase 5b”, and “What would be required... (Phase 5b-aligned)” listing Phase 5b required artifacts like `context/checkpoint_audit_BCIN-7547.md`, `context/checkpoint_delta_BCIN-7547.md`, `drafts/qa_plan_phase5b_r<round>.md`, plus the Phase 5b disposition requirement). execution_notes.md also lists the Phase 5b required outputs and notes inability to verify them due to missing artifacts.
